subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 322686470 (110324797) is not a GRB
body:
C. Meegan(USRA) reports on behalf of the
Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:
 
The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 322686470 
(110324797)at 19:07:48 UT on 24 March 2011, tentatively 
classified as a GRB,is in fact not due to a GRB. 
This trigger is due to a class C1.3 solar flare.
